---

**Subject Line:**  
**Verify Your Account Details – Action Required Within 24 Hours**

---

**Body:**

Dear [First Name],

We’ve noticed unusual activity on your account and want to ensure your information remains secure. To protect your account, we need you to verify your personal details.

Please click the button below to complete the verification process. This is a simple 2-step process and will take just a few minutes of your time.

[**Verify Account Details Now**]

If you are unable to click the button, please copy and paste the following link into your browser:  
[https://secure.bankname.com/verify-account](https://secure.bankname.com/verify-account)

Should you have any questions or need assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team at **support@bankname.com** or call us at **1-800-123-4567**.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best regards,  
**BankName Customer Service Team**  
[Bank Logo or Website URL]  
[Bank Address and Contact Information]

---

- Replace **[First Name]**, **[BankName]**, and any other placeholders with actual details.  
- You can also add a small icon or logo at the top to make it look more authentic.
